title: ArmourHUD
description: A simple HUD mod that displays your equiped armour and it's durability.
body:
# Armour HUD
![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/Vtd30Bc2?logo=modrinth&logoColor=1bd96a&label=Downloads&color=1bd96a)

## How to?
Either open the config though ModMenu or bind a config key
